face.structure: angular with a slightly pointed chin, high cheekbones that suggest vigilance and attention to detail

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a subtle upward tilt
eyes.color: deep umber with flecks of gold
details: faint crease near the inner corners
eyes.expression_effect: constantly analyzing with an intentful gaze

face.expression: stoic with a hint of introspection

skin.texture: smooth with a slight matte finish
skin.rendering_notes: maintains consistent tone with soft shadowing around the jawline

hair.style: neatly parted to the side, slicked back with subtle volume
hair.flow: sleek and straight with a slight flow at the ends
details: a faint sheen reflecting light evenly

character.aura: cerebral and composed, exuding a calm authority

outfit.fit: slim tailored fit, emphasizing discipline and precision

composition.framing: mid-shot focused on the upper body and face
composition.pose: standing straight with hands clasped gently in front
composition.gesture: leaning slightly forward as if listening intently

background.type: abstract suggestive of a strategic mind
background.color_palette: gradients of soft blues and greys
background.details: intersecting lines forming complex geometric patterns
background.rules: no strong elements to detract from the character
